checkin.journal:
Not feeling great again, pressure in morning but made a turn around later
Woke up at 3:30 🕞 
Went to emergency 🚨 gave me sleeping pills strong ones. Bough lt milder ones
Gym pt milka only breathing easy stuff she saw how i was and that was smart
Teeth cleaning
Went to Ma’s clinic for massage was very good 
Had a call with Alex and he made a miracle he turned my feeling of going to Turkey from being afraid to love, gratitude, excitement - i mean wow 😯 Even caro was surprised
Ate soup - slept for
